# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on self-hosted runners in our datacenter. The workflow executes custom build scripts and deployment commands provided by developers. This gives our team flexibility to run any build process they need on our infrastructure.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Custom Build and Deploy on Self-Hosted Runners

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      build_script:
        description: 'Custom build script or commands to execute'
        required: true
        default: './scripts/build.sh'
        type: string
      deploy_script:
        description: 'Custom deployment script or commands to execute'
        required: false
        default: ''
        type: string
      working_directory:
        description: 'Working directory for script execution'
        required: false
        default: '.'
        type: string
      environment:
        description: 'Target deployment environment'
        required: false
        default: 'staging'
        type: choice
        options:
          - development
          - staging
          - production
      pre_build_dependencies:
        description: 'Commands to install dependencies before build'
        required: false
        default: ''
        type: string
      post_deploy_commands:
        description: 'Commands to run after deployment (e.g., health checks)'
        required: false
        default: ''
        type: string
  push:
    branches:
      - main
      - develop
    paths:
      - 'scripts/**'
      - 'src/**'
      - 'Makefile'
      - 'Dockerfile'

env:
  BUILD_ARTIFACTS_DIR: ./build-artifacts
  LOG_DIR: ./build-logs
  DEFAULT_TIMEOUT: 30

jobs:
  validate:
    name: Validate Inputs and Environment
    runs-on: [self-hosted, linux, datacenter]
    outputs:
      build_script: ${{ steps.set-scripts.outputs.build_script }}
      deploy_script: ${{ steps.set-scripts.outputs.deploy_script }}
      should_deploy: ${{ steps.set-scripts.outputs.should_deploy }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set script defaults for push events
        id: set-scripts
        run: |
          if [ "${{ github.event_name }}" = "workflow_dispatch" ]; then
            echo "build_script=${{ inputs.build_script }}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
            echo "deploy_script=${{ inputs.deploy_script }}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
            if [ -n "${{ inputs.deploy_script }}" ]; then
              echo "should_deploy=true" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
            else
              echo "should_deploy=false" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
            fi
          else
            # Default scripts for push-triggered builds
            if [ -f "./scripts/build.sh" ]; then
              echo "build_script=./scripts/build.sh" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
            elif [ -f "Makefile" ]; then
              echo "build_script=make build" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
            else
              echo "build_script=echo 'No default build script found'" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
            fi
            echo "deploy_script=" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
            echo "should_deploy=false" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          fi

      - name: Validate runner environment
        run: |
          echo "=== Runner Environment Info ==="
          echo "Hostname: $(hostname)"
          echo "OS: $(uname -a)"
          echo "User: $(whoami)"
          echo "Working Directory: $(pwd)"
          echo "Disk Space:"
          df -h .
          echo "Memory:"
          free -h || echo "free command not available"
          echo "Available tools:"
          for tool in docker docker-compose make gcc node python3 java mvn gradle go rustc; do
            if command -v $tool &> /dev/null; then
              echo "  ✓ $tool: $($tool --version 2>&1 | head -1)"
            else
              echo "  ✗ $tool: not installed"
            fi
          done

      - name: Check script files exist (if file paths provided)
        run: |
          BUILD_SCRIPT="${{ steps.set-scripts.outputs.build_script }}"
          DEPLOY_SCRIPT="${{ steps.set-scripts.outputs.deploy_script }}"

          # Check if build_script is a file path (starts with ./ or /)
          if [[ "$BUILD_SCRIPT" == ./* ]] || [[ "$BUILD_SCRIPT" == /* ]]; then
            if [ ! -f "$BUILD_SCRIPT" ]; then
              echo "::error::Build script not found: $BUILD_SCRIPT"
              exit 1
            fi
            echo "Build script found: $BUILD_SCRIPT"
          else
            echo "Build input is a command: $BUILD_SCRIPT"
          fi

          if [ -n "$DEPLOY_SCRIPT" ]; then
            if [[ "$DEPLOY_SCRIPT" == ./* ]] || [[ "$DEPLOY_SCRIPT" == /* ]]; then
              if [ ! -f "$DEPLOY_SCRIPT" ]; then
                echo "::error::Deploy script not found: $DEPLOY_SCRIPT"
                exit 1
              fi
              echo "Deploy script found: $DEPLOY_SCRIPT"
            else
              echo "Deploy input is a command: $DEPLOY_SCRIPT"
            fi
          fi

  build:
    name: Execute Custom Build
    needs: validate
    runs-on: [self-hosted, linux, datacenter]
    timeout-minutes: 60
    env:
      CI: true
      BUILD_NUMBER: ${{ github.run_number }}
      BUILD_SHA: ${{ github.sha }}
      BUILD_BRANCH: ${{ github.ref_name }}
      TARGET_ENV: ${{ inputs.environment || 'staging' }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0
          submodules: recursive

      - name: Prepare build environment
        run: |
          mkdir -p "${{ env.BUILD_ARTIFACTS_DIR }}"
          mkdir -p "${{ env.LOG_DIR }}"

          echo "=== Build Context ==="
          echo "Repository: ${{ github.repository }}"
          echo "Branch: ${{ github.ref_name }}"
          echo "Commit: ${{ github.sha }}"
          echo "Build Number: ${{ github.run_number }}"
          echo "Triggered by: ${{ github.actor }}"
          echo "Event: ${{ github.event_name }}"
          echo "Target Environment: ${{ env.TARGET_ENV }}"
          echo "Timestamp: $(date -u '+%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ')"

      - name: Install pre-build dependencies
        if: inputs.pre_build_dependencies != ''
        working-directory: ${{ inputs.working_directory || '.' }}
        run: |
          echo "=== Installing Pre-Build Dependencies ==="
          ${{ inputs.pre_build_dependencies }} 2>&1 | tee "${{ env.LOG_DIR }}/dependencies.log"

      - name: Execute custom build script
        id: build
        working-directory: ${{ inputs.working_directory || '.' }}
        run: |
          echo "=== Starting Custom Build ==="
          echo "Build command: ${{ needs.validate.outputs.build_script }}"
          echo "Start time: $(date -u '+%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ')"
          
          BUILD_START=$(date +%s)
          
          # Make script executable if it's a file
          BUILD_CMD="${{ needs.validate.outputs.build_script }}"
          if [[ "$BUILD_CMD" == ./* ]] || [[ "$BUILD_CMD" == /* ]]; then
            chmod +x "$BUILD_CMD"
          fi
          
          # Execute the build and capture output
          set -o pipefail
          eval "$BUILD_CMD" 2>&1 | tee "${{ env.LOG_DIR }}/build.log"
          BUILD_EXIT_CODE=${PIPESTATUS[0]}
          
          BUILD_END=$(date +%s)
          BUILD_DURATION=$((BUILD_END - BUILD_START))
          
          echo "build_duration=${BUILD_DURATION}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "build_exit_code=${BUILD_EXIT_CODE}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          
          echo "=== Build Complete ==="
          echo "Duration: ${BUILD_DURATION}s"
          echo "Exit Code: ${BUILD_EXIT_CODE}"
          
          if [ $BUILD_EXIT_CODE -ne 0 ]; then
            echo "::error::Build failed with exit code $BUILD_EXIT_CODE"
            exit $BUILD_EXIT_CODE
          fi

      - name: Collect build artifacts
        if: always()
        run: |
          # Collect any generated artifacts
          echo "=== Collecting Build Artifacts ==="
          
          # Common artifact locations
          for dir in dist build output target bin release pkg; do
            if [ -d "${{ inputs.working_directory || '.' }}/$dir" ]; then
              echo "Found artifact directory: $dir"
              cp -r "${{ inputs.working_directory || '.' }}/$dir" "${{ env.BUILD_ARTIFACTS_DIR }}/" 2>/dev/null || true
            fi
          done
          
          # List collected artifacts
          echo "Collected artifacts:"
          find "${{ env.BUILD_ARTIFACTS_DIR }}" -type f | head -50 || echo "No artifacts found"

      - name: Upload build artifacts
        if: always()
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-artifacts-${{ github.run_number }}
          path: ${{ env.BUILD_ARTIFACTS_DIR }}
          retention-days: 30
          if-no-files-found: ignore

      - name: Upload build logs
        if: always()
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-logs-${{ github.run_number }}
          path: ${{ env.LOG_DIR }}
          retention-days: 14

      - name: Build summary
        if: always()
        run: |
          echo "## Build Summary" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "| Property | Value |" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "|----------|-------|" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "| **Status** | ${{ steps.build.outcome == 'success' && '✅ Success' || '❌ Failed' }} |" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "| **Duration** | ${{ steps.build.outputs.build_duration }}s |" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "| **Branch** | \`${{ github.ref_name }}\` |" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "| **Commit** | \`${{ github.sha }}\` |" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "| **Build Command** | \`${{ needs.validate.outputs.build_script }}\` |" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "| **Environment** | ${{ env.TARGET_ENV }} |" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "| **Runner** | $(hostname) |" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "| **Triggered by** | @${{ github.actor }} |" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"

  deploy:
    name: Execute Custom Deployment
    needs: [validate, build]
    if: needs.validate.outputs.should_deploy == 'true'
    runs-on: [self-hosted, linux, datacenter]
    timeout-minutes: 45
    environment:
      name: ${{ inputs.environment || 'staging' }}
    concurrency:
      group: deploy-${{ inputs.environment || 'staging' }}
      cancel-in-progress: false
    env:
      CI: true
      DEPLOY_ENV: ${{ inputs.environment || 'staging' }}
      BUILD_NUMBER: ${{ github.run_number }}
      BUILD_SHA: ${{ github.sha }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-artifacts-${{ github.run_number }}
          path: ${{ env.BUILD_ARTIFACTS_DIR }}

      - name: Pre-deployment checks
        run: |
          echo "=== Pre-Deployment Checks ==="
          echo "Environment: ${{ env.DEPLOY_ENV }}"
          echo "Build Number: ${{ github.run_number }}"
          echo "Deploying commit: ${{ github.sha }}"
          
          mkdir -p "${{ env.LOG_DIR }}"
          
          # Verify artifacts exist
          if [ -d "${{ env.BUILD_ARTIFACTS_DIR }}" ]; then
            echo "Build artifacts found:"
            ls -la "${{ env.BUILD_ARTIFACTS_DIR }}/"
          else
            echo "::warning::No build artifacts directory found"
          fi

      - name: Execute custom deploy script
        id: deploy
        working-directory: ${{ inputs.working_directory || '.' }}
        run: |
          echo "=== Starting Deployment ==="
          echo "Deploy command: ${{ needs.validate.outputs.deploy_script }}"
          echo "Start time: $(date -u '+%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ')"
          
          DEPLOY_START=$(date +%s)
          
          # Make script executable if it's a file
          DEPLOY_CMD="${{ needs.validate.outputs.deploy_script }}"
          if [[ "$DEPLOY_CMD" == ./* ]] || [[ "$DEPLOY_CMD" == /* ]]; then
            chmod +x "$DEPLOY_CMD"
          fi
          
          # Execute the deployment and capture output
          set -o pipefail
          eval "$DEPLOY_CMD" 2>&1 | tee "${{ env.LOG_DIR }}/deploy.log"
          DEPLOY_EXIT_CODE=${PIPESTATUS[0]}
          
          DEPLOY_END=$(date +%s)
          DEPLOY_DURATION=$((DEPLOY_END - DEPLOY_START))
          
          echo "deploy_duration=${DEPLOY_DURATION}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "deploy_exit_code=${DEPLOY_EXIT_CODE}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          
          echo "=== Deployment Complete ==="
          echo "Duration: ${DEPLOY_DURATION}s"
          echo "Exit Code: ${DEPLOY_EXIT_CODE}"
          
          if [ $DEPLOY_EXIT_CODE -ne 0 ]; then
            echo "::error::Deployment failed with exit code $DEPLOY_EXIT_CODE"
            exit $DEPLOY_EXIT_CODE
          fi

      - name: Post-deployment commands
        if: success() && inputs.post_deploy_commands != ''
        working-directory: ${{ inputs.working_directory || '.' }}
        run: |
          echo "=== Running Post-Deployment Commands ==="
          ${{ inputs.post_deploy_commands }} 2>&1 | tee "${{ env.LOG_DIR }}/post-deploy.log"

      - name: Upload deployment logs
        if: always()
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: deploy-logs-${{ github.run_number }}
          path: ${{ env.LOG_DIR }}
          retention-days: 14

      - name: Deployment summary
        if: always()
        run: |
          echo "## Deployment Summary" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "| Property | Value |" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "|----------|-------|" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "| **Status** | ${{ steps.deploy.outcome == 'success' && '✅ Success' || '❌ Failed' }} |" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "| **Duration** | ${{ steps.deploy.outputs.deploy_duration }}s |" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "| **Environment** | ${{ env.DEPLOY_ENV }} |" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "| **Deploy Command** | \`${{ needs.validate.outputs.deploy_script }}\` |" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "| **Runner** | $(hostname) |" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"

  cleanup:
    name: Cleanup Runner Workspace
    needs: [validate, build, deploy]
    if: always()
    runs-on: [self-hosted, linux, datacenter]
    steps:
      - name: Clean workspace
        run: |
          echo "=== Cleaning up workspace ==="
          # Remove build artifacts from runner to save disk space
          rm -rf "${{ env.BUILD_ARTIFACTS_DIR }}" 2>/dev/null || true
          rm -rf "${{ env.LOG_DIR }}" 2>/dev/null || true
          
          # Clean up Docker resources if Docker is available
          if command -v docker &> /dev/null; then
            echo "Pruning dangling Docker images..."
            docker image prune -f 2>/dev/null || true
          fi
          
          echo "Remaining disk space:"
          df -h .
